title: Everbright
body:
## Everbright

Everbright aims to provide the best gameplay experience while keeping everything familiar. This project was built on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), making it lightweight. It also includes quality-of-life improvements, visual enhancements, and useful resource packs.
<details>
<summary>Versioning</summary>

### x.y.z
- x: The number changes with large changes.
- y: The number changes with small changes.
- z: The number changes if the version of the game changes.
- If the parent number changes, the child numbers are reset, even though the changes applicable to the number change may have taken effect.

### Differences
Keep in mind that each version is slightly different, even if it may not seem like it. You can refer to the [changelog](https://modrinth.com/modpack/everbright/changelog) (which does not include removed mods) for details.

</details>



Some versions of this modpack use [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework).
